value.found_quote: Skills plus MCP is where it all comes together: skills define repeatable workflows, and MCP connects them to external tools and systems. If a skill depends on MCP, declare that dependency in `agents/openai.yaml` so Codex can install and wire it automatically
value.rationale: The page has a dedicated "Skills + MCP together" section describing skills defining repeatable workflows that connect to external tools via MCP, with dependencies declared in agents/openai.yaml so Codex installs and wires them automatically. This directly substantiates all elements of the claim.
